aspirin.example: She took an aspirin for her headache.
aspirin.example_zh: 她吃了一顆阿斯匹靈治頭痛。

assemble.example: The students assembled in the hall.

assembly.example: We have a school assembly every Monday.
The car parts move along the assembly line.
assembly.example_zh: 汽車零件沿著裝配線移動。

assign.example: The teacher assigned us a writing task.
assign.example_zh: 老師指派我們一項寫作作業。

assistance.example: She offered assistance to the lost tourist.

associate.example: We associate summer with the beach.
associate.example_zh: 我們把夏天和海灘聯想在一起。

associate.example: He is a business associate of mine.

association.example_zh: 他加入了一個運動協會。

assurance.example: He gave us his assurance that it was safe.
assurance.example_zh: 他向我們保證那是安全的。

assure.example: I assure you that everything will be fine.
assure.example_zh: 我向你保證一切都會沒事。

athletic.example: She has an athletic build from years of sport.
athletic.example_zh: 多年運動讓她有健壯的體格。

atmosphere.example: The restaurant has a warm atmosphere.

atmosphere.example_zh: 地球的大氣層保護我們。

atom.example: Everything is made of tiny atoms.
atom.example_zh: 萬物都由微小的原子構成。

attach.example: Please attach the file to your email.
attach.example_zh: 請把檔案附在你的郵件中。

attraction.example: There is a strong attraction between them.
attraction.example_zh: 他們之間有很強的吸引力。

attraction.example: The waterfall is a popular tourist attraction.
attraction.example_zh: 這座瀑布是熱門的觀光景點。

audio.example: The audio quality of the video is poor.

authentic.example_zh: 我們吃了道地的義大利菜。

authority.example: The police have the authority to stop cars.
The local authorities built a new park.
authority.example_zh: 當地當局蓋了一座新公園。

autobiography.example: She wrote an autobiography about her life.
autobiography.example_zh: 她寫了一本關於自己人生的自傳。

autograph.example: The fans asked the star for an autograph.

baid.example: The teacher explained how to use the word in a sentence.
baid.example_zh: 老師說明了如何在句子中使用這個字。

ballet.example: She has studied ballet since she was five.
ballet.example_zh: 她從五歲起就學芭蕾舞。

bandage.example: The nurse put a bandage on his cut.
bandage.example_zh: 護理師在他的傷口上包了繃帶。

bankrupt.example: The company went bankrupt last year.
The bad deal nearly bankrupted him.
bankrupt.example_zh: 這筆爛交易差點讓他破產。

bargain.example: These shoes were a real bargain.
She bargained for a lower price.

barrier.example: Language can be a barrier when traveling.
barrier.example_zh: 旅行時語言可能成為障礙。

basin.example: She washed her face in the basin.

battery.example: My phone battery is almost dead.
battery.example_zh: 我的手機電池快沒電了。

beggar.example: The beggar asked for some coins.

behavior.example_zh: 他在學校的行為有所改善。

bin.example: Throw the trash in the bin.

biography.example: I read a biography of a famous scientist.
biography.example_zh: 我讀了一位著名科學家的傳記。

biology.example: We studied plants in biology class.
biology.example_zh: 我們在生物課研究植物。

blade.example: The knife has a sharp blade.

blend.example: Blend the fruit to make a smoothie.
This coffee is a blend of two beans.
blend.example_zh: 這款咖啡是兩種豆子的混合。

blessing.example: Good health is a great blessing.

blink.example: She blinked in the bright light.
It happened in the blink of an eye.
blink.example_zh: 一眨眼的功夫就發生了。

bloom.example: The roses bloom in early summer.
The garden is in full bloom.

blossom.example: The cherry trees blossom in spring.

boast.example: He likes to boast about his new car.

bond.example: There is a strong bond between the sisters.
bond.example_zh: 這對姊妹之間有很深的情感。

bounce.example: The ball bounced off the wall.
The ball has a good bounce.

breed.example: The poodle is a popular breed of dog.
breed.example_zh: 貴賓犬是很受歡迎的狗品種。

bridegroom-groom.example: The bridegroom waited for the bride.

broke.example: I am broke until I get paid.
broke.example_zh: 在領薪水之前我身無分文。

broom.example: She swept the floor with a broom.

brutal.example: The weather was brutal during the storm.
brutal.example_zh: 暴風雨期間天氣十分惡劣。

bulletin.example: Check the bulletin board for the schedule.

burglar.example: A burglar broke into the house at night.
burglar.example_zh: 一名竊賊在夜裡闖入屋內。

cabinet.example: The cups are kept in the kitchen cabinet.
The president met with his cabinet.

calculation.example: My calculation showed the right answer.
calculation.example_zh: 我的計算得出正確答案。

calorie.example: This snack is high in calories.
